seo.title: HR Lite | Lean Recruitment Management
seo.description: HR Lite - A lean recruitment management solution for independent recruiters and small HR teams. Manage candidates, jobs, and smart reconciliation with AI.
seo.keywords: recruitment, HR Lite, candidate management, ATS, lean recruitment, AI CV filtering, recruitment portal, recruitment dashboard

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your recruitment

errors.invalidCreds: Invalid email or password. You may need to Sign Up first.
errors.emailInUse: Email is already registered. Switch to Log In.
errors.googleFail: Failed to sign in with Google.
errors.generic: An error occurred. Check if Firebase structure is valid.

invitation.title: Workspace Invitation
invitation.terms: By joining this workspace, you will be able to collaborate with the team, view mandate details, and participate in the recruitment process based on your assigned role.

MEMBER_REMOVED.title: Membership Revoked
MEMBER_REMOVED.message: Your access to "{{workspaceName}}" has been removed by an administrator.

INVITE_RECEIVED.title: New Workspace Invitation
INVITE_RECEIVED.message: You have been invited to join "{{workspaceName}}" as a {{role}}.

INVITE_ACCEPTED_BY_USER.title: Invitation Accepted
INVITE_ACCEPTED_BY_USER.message: {{userEmail}} has accepted your invitation to join "{{workspaceName}}".

INVITE_DECLINED.title: Invitation Declined
INVITE_DECLINED.message: You declined the invitation to join "{{workspaceName}}".

INVITE_DECLINED_BY_USER.title: Invitation Declined
INVITE_DECLINED_BY_USER.message: {{userEmail}} has declined your invitation to join "{{workspaceName}}".

verify.title: Verify your email
verify.subtitle: We've sent a verification link to {{email}}. Please check your inbox and click the link to activate your account.
verify.resendSuccess: Verification email sent! Check your inbox.

workspace.createSubtitle: Set up your team's recruitment environment.
workspace.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe the purpose of this workspace...

plans.modalSubtitle: Unlock automated parsing, larger candidate sheets, and unlimited pipelines.
plans.requestDesc: Send a direct request to your workspace owners and our billing desk. We will activate the plan as soon as it is approved.
plans.placeholderText: e.g. Please upgrade our workspace for upcoming high-volume engineering recruitment.
plans.successDesc: Your upgrade request for {{planName}} has been queued. Our admin team will approve it shortly and notify you via email.
plans.submitError: Could not send your upgrade request. Please try again later.
plans.submitMockNotice: Request saved. Email was not sent (billing API key not configured on server).

free.name: Free Plan
free.desc: Ideal for getting started and personal recruitment.

pro.name: Professional
pro.desc: Perfect for growing businesses and team hiring.

team.name: Enterprise Team
team.desc: Ultimate features for agencies and scaling enterprises.

usage.limitReachedAlert: Resource limits reached. Upgrade to unlock full access.
usage.limitNearAlert: Approaching limits. We recommend upgrading soon.
usage.jobLimitReachedDesc: You have reached the active job limit for your plan. Upgrade to post more jobs.
usage.candidateLimitReachedDesc: You have reached the candidate limit for your plan. Upgrade to add more candidates.
usage.cvParseLimitReachedDesc: You have reached the CV parsing limit for your plan. Upgrade to parse more CVs.
